title: cubelium concolor
side_effects: Cubelium concolor can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, dizziness, and stomach pain due to its high toxicity levels. In severe cases, overexposure to the plant's extracts can lead to respiratory failure, seizures, and even coma. Prolonged use can also damage the liver and kidneys, causing long-term health complications. Additionally, improper preparation and consumption of the plant can result in allergic reactions, skin irritation, and increased heart rate.
